instructions.name: accrue_interest
docs: Crank: accrue interest on a position.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Anyone can call this crank.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: Global CDP config — read for current cdp_rise_sol_minted and ceiling multiplier.

accounts.name: global_pool
docs: GlobalPool from staking — read for staking_rise_sol_supply (ceiling denominator).

instructions.name: add_collateral
docs: Add collateral to an existing position.

instructions.name: borrow_more
docs: Mint additional riseSOL against an existing open position (subject to max LTV).

accounts.name: global_pool
docs: GlobalPool from the staking program — read for exchange rate and staking supply.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: Global CDP config — tracks total CDP riseSOL minted and debt ceiling.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral mint — needed for decimal scaling when recomputing collateral USD value.

accounts.name: rise_sol_mint
docs: The riseSOL mint — needed for the mint_for_cdp CPI.

accounts.name: borrower_rise_sol_account
docs: Borrower's riseSOL token account to receive minted tokens.

accounts.name: borrow_rewards_config
docs: Global borrow rewards config — updated with new total_cdp_debt.

accounts.name: borrow_rewards
docs: Per-position borrow rewards — settled before debt increases.

instructions.name: checkpoint_borrow_rewards
docs: Permissionless crank — advance the global reward_per_token accumulator.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless — anyone can call this crank.

instructions.name: claim_borrow_rewards
docs: Claim accumulated RISE borrow rewards for a CDP position.

instructions.name: close_borrow_rewards
docs: Close borrow_rewards_config and borrow_rewards_vault. Authority only.
Burns any remaining tokens in the vault before closing. Use this to
reset and re-initialize with a new RISE mint.

accounts.name: old_rise_mint
docs: The old RISE mint stored in the vault — needed for the burn CPI.

instructions.name: close_position
docs: Close a CDP position.

accounts.name: rise_sol_mint
docs: The riseSOL mint.

accounts.name: borrower_rise_sol_account
docs: Borrower's riseSOL account to burn from.

accounts.name: borrower_collateral_account
docs: Borrower's collateral account to return tokens to.

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: Protocol collateral vault.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: Global CDP config — cdp_rise_sol_minted decremented; PDA signs notify CPI.

accounts.name: global_pool
docs: GlobalPool from staking — updated by notify_rise_sol_burned CPI.

instructions.name: collect_cdp_fees
docs: Sweep accumulated CDP interest fees and distribute via 5/47.5/47.5 split.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless — any account can trigger the sweep.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: CDP config PDA — signs the register_external_revenue CPI.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: ProtocolTreasury from the staking program. Written via CPI.

accounts.name: global_pool
docs: GlobalPool from staking — updated by credit_staking_revenue CPI.

instructions.name: initialize_borrow_rewards
docs: Initialize the borrow rewards config and vault. Authority only.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: Global CDP config — used to verify authority.

accounts.name: rewards_vault
docs: Token account PDA that will hold RISE for borrow rewards.
Authority is the borrow_rewards_config PDA itself.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Must be the standard SPL Token program — Token-2022 is not accepted.

instructions.name: initialize_cdp_config
docs: Initialize the global CDP config (debt ceiling). Authority only.

instructions.name: initialize_collateral_config
docs: Initialize a new accepted collateral type. Authority only.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority — only this account can add collateral types.

accounts.name: collateral_config
docs: The collateral config PDA being created.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: The collateral token mint being whitelisted.

instructions.name: initialize_collateral_vault
docs: Initialize the token vault for a collateral type. Authority only.

instructions.name: initialize_payment_config
docs: Initialize a payment token config (SOL, USDC, USDT, BTC, ETH). Authority only.

instructions.name: liquidate
docs: Liquidate an unhealthy position.
`route_plan_data` is Borsh-serialized `Vec<RoutePlanStep>` from the Jupiter quote API.
See `src/jupiter.rs` for encoding notes.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless — any caller can trigger a valid liquidation.
Receives the trigger fee; pays rent for cdp_wsol_vault if first use.

accounts.name: borrower_collateral_account
docs: Borrower's collateral account — receives excess collateral if any.

accounts.name: global_pool
docs: GlobalPool from staking — read for exchange rate.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: Global CDP config — authority for cdp_wsol_vault; tracks total minted.

accounts.name: cdp_fee_vault
docs: CDP fee vault — receives interest portion of Jupiter swap output.

accounts.name: wsol_mint
docs: Native SOL (WSOL) mint — Jupiter outputs WSOL which is then unwrapped.

accounts.name: cdp_wsol_vault
docs: Protocol WSOL buffer: receives Jupiter's WSOL output, then closed to unwrap.

instructions.name: open_position
docs: Open a new CDP position.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: Global CDP config — tracks total CDP riseSOL minted and debt ceiling.

accounts.name: global_pool
docs: GlobalPool from staking — read-only for staking_rise_sol_supply (ceiling denominator).

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: The collateral token mint.

accounts.name: borrower_collateral_account
docs: Borrower's collateral token account to transfer from.

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: Protocol's collateral vault for this token type.

accounts.name: rise_sol_mint
docs: The riseSOL mint — needed for the mint_for_cdp CPI.

accounts.name: borrower_rise_sol_account
docs: Borrower's riseSOL token account to receive minted tokens.

accounts.name: borrow_rewards_config
docs: Global borrow rewards config — updated with new total_cdp_debt.

accounts.name: borrow_rewards
docs: Per-position borrow rewards tracker — initialized here.

instructions.name: redeem_collateral_for_liquidity
docs: Seize collateral to cover a staking pool liquidity shortfall. Permissionless.
`route_plan_data` is Borsh-serialized `Vec<RoutePlanStep>` from the Jupiter quote API;
the seized collateral is swapped → SOL and deposited into pool_vault as liquid buffer.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Permissionless — any caller can trigger when conditions are met.
Pays rent for cdp_wsol_vault / cdp_seizure_vault init if first use.

accounts.name: global_pool
docs: GlobalPool from staking — read to verify the liquidity shortfall condition.

accounts.name: cdp_seizure_vault
docs: Intermediate holding account for seized tokens. Authority = collateral_vault
so it can sign as user_transfer_authority for Jupiter.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: Global CDP config — authority for cdp_wsol_vault.

accounts.name: wsol_mint
docs: Native SOL (WSOL) mint — Jupiter outputs WSOL which is then unwrapped.

accounts.name: cdp_wsol_vault
docs: Protocol WSOL buffer: receives Jupiter's WSOL output, then closed → pool_vault.

instructions.name: repay_debt
docs: Repay all or part of a CDP debt using SOL or an accepted SPL token.
For SPL token payments, `route_plan_data` is Borsh-serialized `Vec<RoutePlanStep>` from
the Jupiter quote API; it is swapped to SOL on-chain. Pass empty / 0 for native SOL.
`shortfall_route_plan_data` is a second Jupiter route (WSOL → collateral) used only on
full repayment when collateral was previously seized. Pass empty / 0 in the common case.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: Global CDP config — tracks total minted; authority for cdp_wsol_vault and cdp_wsol_buyback_vault.

accounts.name: cdp_fee_vault
docs: CDP fee vault — receives interest portion; also buffers SPL-path SOL before routing.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral token mint — needed for decimal scaling in shortfall SOL computation.

accounts.name: borrower_payment_account
docs: Borrower's payment token account — Jupiter's source for the inbound swap.

accounts.name: wsol_mint
docs: Native SOL (WSOL) mint.

accounts.name: cdp_wsol_vault
docs: Protocol WSOL buffer: receives Jupiter's inbound WSOL output, then closed to unwrap.

accounts.name: cdp_wsol_buyback_vault
docs: Protocol WSOL buyback vault: holds WSOL for the reverse swap (WSOL → collateral).
Only funded when a shortfall buyback is needed on full repayment.

instructions.name: repay_debt_rise_sol
docs: Repay all or part of a CDP debt by burning riseSOL tokens directly (1:1).
`shortfall_route_plan_data` is used on full repayment when seized collateral must be
bought back via Jupiter. Pass empty / 0 when no shortfall is expected (the common case).

accounts.name: rise_sol_mint
docs: The riseSOL mint — needed to burn tokens.

accounts.name: borrower_rise_sol_account
docs: Borrower's riseSOL token account to burn from.

accounts.name: collateral_vault
docs: Protocol collateral vault — returns tokens on full repayment.

accounts.name: borrower_collateral_account
docs: Borrower's collateral account — receives collateral back on full repayment.

accounts.name: collateral_mint
docs: Collateral token mint — needed for decimal scaling in shortfall SOL computation.

accounts.name: cdp_config
docs: Global CDP config — tracks total CDP riseSOL minted; PDA signer for staking CPIs.

accounts.name: global_pool
docs: GlobalPool from staking — updated by notify_rise_sol_burned CPI.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Protocol treasury — reserve_lamports decremented by buyback withdrawal.

accounts.name: treasury_vault
docs: Protocol treasury SOL vault — source of buyback funds (shortfall path only).

accounts.name: wsol_mint
docs: Native SOL (WSOL) mint — needed for Jupiter buyback swap.

accounts.name: cdp_wsol_buyback_vault
docs: Protocol WSOL buyback vault: receives treasury SOL (via staking CPI), wrapped as WSOL,
then swapped → collateral tokens → borrower. Only funded on shortfall path.

accounts.name: borrow_rewards_config
docs: Global borrow rewards config — total_cdp_debt decremented on principal paydown.

accounts.name: borrow_rewards
docs: Per-position borrow rewards — settled before debt is reduced.

instructions.name: update_collateral_config
docs: Update parameters on an existing collateral config. Authority only.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority — only this account can update collateral configs.

accounts.name: collateral_config
docs: The collateral config to update.

instructions.name: update_debt_ceiling
docs: Update the global CDP debt ceiling multiplier. Authority or governance only.

instructions.name: withdraw_excess
docs: Queue an excess collateral withdrawal.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: CollateralNotAccepted
errors.msg: This collateral type is not accepted

errors.name: ExceedsMaxLtv
errors.msg: Borrow amount exceeds maximum LTV

errors.name: PositionHealthy
errors.msg: Position is healthy and cannot be liquidated

errors.name: PositionUnhealthy
errors.msg: Position is unhealthy and must be liquidated before withdrawal

errors.name: InsufficientExcess
errors.msg: Insufficient excess collateral to withdraw requested amount

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow occurred

errors.name: StaleOraclePrice
errors.msg: Oracle price is stale

errors.name: InvalidOraclePrice
errors.msg: Oracle price is invalid

errors.name: PositionClosed
errors.msg: Position is already closed

errors.name: InterestUpToDate
errors.msg: Interest accrual is up to date

errors.name: RepaymentExceedsDebt
errors.msg: Repayment amount exceeds outstanding debt

errors.name: PoolPaused
errors.msg: The pool is currently paused

errors.name: PaymentConfigInactive
errors.msg: This payment token is not active

errors.name: NoCdpFeesToCollect
errors.msg: No CDP fees accumulated to collect

errors.name: DebtCeilingExceeded
errors.msg: Minting would exceed the global CDP debt ceiling

errors.name: ExceedsSingleLoanCap
errors.msg: Loan amount exceeds the 5% single-loan cap

errors.name: LiquidityRedemptionNotNeeded
errors.msg: Liquidity redemption not needed — liquid buffer covers pending withdrawals

errors.name: NoRewardsToClaim
errors.msg: No borrow rewards available to claim

errors.name: BorrowRewardsNotInitialized
errors.msg: Borrow rewards not yet initialized

errors.name: InsufficientPriceConfidence
errors.msg: Oracle price confidence interval is too wide

errors.name: CollateralShortfall
errors.msg: Collateral shortfall exists — provide a buyback route to complete repayment

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not authorized for this operation

types.name: BorrowRewards
docs: Per-position borrow-rewards tracker.
One account per open CDP position.

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that owns the linked CDP position.

fields.name: position
docs: The CdpPosition this account tracks.

fields.name: reward_debt
docs: reward_per_token * debt / REWARD_SCALE at last settlement.
Subtracted when computing newly-accrued rewards.

fields.name: pending_rewards
docs: Accumulated RISE not yet claimed.

fields.name: last_checkpoint_slot
docs: Slot of last settlement.

fields.name: total_claimed
docs: Lifetime RISE claimed from this account.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA.

types.name: BorrowRewardsConfig
docs: Global borrow-rewards configuration. One account for the entire CDP program.

fields.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority.

fields.name: rise_mint
docs: RISE token mint.

fields.name: rewards_vault
docs: PDA token account that holds RISE for distribution.

fields.name: reward_per_token
docs: Global reward accumulator: RISE earned per unit of debt (scaled by REWARD_SCALE).

fields.name: epoch_emissions
docs: RISE tokens emitted per epoch across all borrowers combined.

fields.name: slots_per_epoch
docs: Epoch length in slots.

fields.name: total_cdp_debt
docs: Sum of rise_sol_debt_principal across all open positions.

fields.name: last_checkpoint_slot
docs: Slot of last checkpoint_borrow_rewards call.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA.

types.name: CdpConfig
docs: Global CDP configuration. One account for the entire program.

fields.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority — can update debt ceiling.

fields.name: cdp_rise_sol_minted
docs: Total riseSOL currently minted via CDP (principal only, not interest).

fields.name: debt_ceiling_multiplier_bps
docs: Maximum CDP riseSOL as a multiple of staking riseSOL supply, in basis points.
Default: 30000 = 3x. Adjustable by governance.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA.

types.name: CdpPosition
docs: A single collateralized debt position.
One account per open CDP, owned by the borrower.

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that opened this position.

fields.name: collateral_mint
docs: Original collateral token mint.

fields.name: collateral_amount_original
docs: Amount of collateral posted in original token units.

fields.name: collateral_usd_value
docs: USD value of collateral at last update (scaled by PRICE_SCALE).

fields.name: rise_sol_debt_principal
docs: riseSOL minted to borrower (principal).

fields.name: interest_accrued
docs: Accumulated interest in riseSOL units.

fields.name: last_accrual_slot
docs: Slot of last interest accrual.

fields.name: health_factor
docs: Last computed health factor (scaled by RATE_SCALE).
Values below RATE_SCALE (1.0) are liquidatable.

fields.name: opened_at_slot
docs: Slot when position was opened.

fields.name: nonce
docs: Position nonce — allows multiple positions per wallet.

fields.name: is_open
docs: Whether position is open.

fields.name: excess_withdrawal_queued
docs: SOL queued for excess withdrawal (in lamports).

fields.name: excess_withdrawal_available_slot
docs: Slot after which queued withdrawal can be processed.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA.

types.name: CollateralConfig
docs: Configuration for an accepted collateral type.
One account per collateral token, managed by governance.

fields.name: mint
docs: SPL token mint of the collateral asset.

fields.name: pyth_price_feed
docs: Pyth price feed account for this asset.

fields.name: max_ltv_bps
docs: Maximum loan-to-value in basis points (e.g. 8500 = 85%).

fields.name: liquidation_threshold_bps
docs: Health factor threshold for liquidation.
e.g. 9000 means liquidation triggered at 90% of max LTV.

fields.name: liquidation_penalty_bps
docs: Liquidation penalty in basis points. Default: 500 (5%).

fields.name: base_rate_bps
docs: Minimum annual interest rate in basis points (at 0% utilization).

fields.name: rate_slope1_bps
docs: Additional annual rate added at optimal utilization (the kink).
e.g. 400 means rate goes from base_rate to base_rate+400 at optimal util.

fields.name: rate_slope2_bps
docs: Additional annual rate added from optimal utilization to 100%.
Steep — discourages pushing past the kink.

fields.name: optimal_utilization_bps
docs: Utilization at which rate slope steepens, in basis points.
e.g. 8000 = 80% of debt ceiling.

fields.name: conversion_slippage_bps
docs: Slippage tolerance for DEX conversions in basis points.

fields.name: active
docs: Whether new positions can be opened with this collateral.

fields.name: total_positions
docs: Number of open positions using this collateral.

fields.name: total_collateral_entitlements
docs: Total collateral owed back to borrowers across all positions for this token.
Incremented on deposit, decremented on return. May exceed vault balance
if some collateral was seized for liquidity — the deficit is covered by
converting from other vaults or SOL when borrowers repay.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA.

fields.name: pending_withdrawals_lamports
docs: SOL committed to pending withdrawal tickets, not yet claimed.

fields.name: cdp_config_pubkey
docs: CDP config PDA authorized to call notify_rise_sol_burned.
Set once by authority via set_cdp_config after both programs are deployed.

fields.name: prev_exchange_rate
docs: Exchange rate recorded at the previous `update_exchange_rate` call.
Used by the frontend to compute APY: annualize (current - prev) / prev over the slot delta.

fields.name: prev_rate_update_slot
docs: Slot at which `prev_exchange_rate` was captured.

fields.name: unstake_nonce
docs: Auto-incrementing counter used to seed withdrawal ticket PDAs.
Removes the need for the caller to supply a nonce.

types.name: PaymentConfig
docs: Configuration for an accepted repayment token.
One account per accepted payment token (SOL, USDC, USDT, BTC, ETH).
Managed by protocol authority.

fields.name: mint
docs: SPL token mint for this payment token.
Use anchor_lang::solana_program::system_program::ID as a sentinel
to represent native SOL (no SPL mint).

fields.name: pyth_price_feed
docs: Pyth price feed account for USD price of this token.

fields.name: active
docs: Whether this payment token is currently accepted.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA.

fields.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority.

fields.name: team_wallet
docs: Team salary wallet — receives team_fee_bps of all revenue.

fields.name: team_fee_bps
docs: Team salary split in basis points. Default: 500 (5%).
Adjustable by authority only.

fields.name: verise_share_bps
docs: Of the remaining 95%, what percentage goes to veRISE holders.
Default: 5000 (50%). Adjustable by governance.

fields.name: reserve_lamports
docs: Total SOL accumulated in treasury reserve (retained portion).

fields.name: revenue_index
docs: Global revenue index for veRISE reward tracking.
Increases each epoch by (epoch_revenue_for_verise / total_verise_supply).

fields.name: total_distributed
docs: Total SOL distributed to veRISE holders all time.

fields.name: last_collection_epoch
docs: Last epoch fees were collected.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA.
